behaviors.description: Missing required key from both file and environment reports exact dotted config path (e.g., database.host).
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module handoff (file config + env overlay + required-key validator + error formatter), not just one pure function. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network/external API required. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. ADVERSARIAL-CRITIQUE: if validation is a single pure function already given merged data, Unit could be enough; however behavior text explicitly requires absence in both sources, so source-merging interaction is part of the failure boundary. Rejected higher level: behavior text is local config loading only, with no real HTTP/subprocess/AI steps.
behaviors.test_description: Use a temp config file missing database.host, clear TOOL_DATABASE_HOST, run loader entrypoint (not full CLI subprocess), assert failure object/message includes exact path database.host.

behaviors.description: When XDG_CONFIG_HOME is set, config path resolves under it instead of ~/.config.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug appears when env reader + path resolver + loader wiring interact. REAL-INFRA: only local env/filesystem, no subprocess/network needed. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. ADVERSARIAL-CRITIQUE: could be Unit if only testing a pure resolve_path() helper; still, behavior is loader-level resolution choice, so integration of env and loader path selection is safer minimum. Rejected higher level: behavior text specifies local path resolution only, not OS event timing, subprocess, or remote services.
behaviors.test_description: Set XDG_CONFIG_HOME to a temp directory containing config.yaml, also place a different file under ~/.config/tool, invoke loader, assert loaded values came from XDG path.

behaviors.description: TOOL_ environment variables override conflicting keys from YAML file.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: precedence failures occur at boundary between file parser, env normalization, and merge order. REAL-INFRA: no real network/subprocess required; local env injection is enough. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. ADVERSARIAL-CRITIQUE: if merge precedence is implemented in one pure function, Unit might catch it; but behavior explicitly spans two configuration sources and loader precedence wiring. Rejected higher level: no behavior text indicating subprocess/HTTP/AI pipeline.
behaviors.test_description: Create config with a value (e.g., database.host=filehost), set TOOL_DATABASE_HOST=envhost, run loader, assert resulting config uses envhost.

behaviors.description: YAML syntax errors surface actionable message containing parser line number.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: real failure involves interaction between actual YAML parser exception payload and app error formatting. REAL-INFRA: no external OS/network/subprocess dependency beyond local file read. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. ADVERSARIAL-CRITIQUE: Unit with a mocked parser exception could test formatting, but that can miss real parser exception shape/fields that cause dropped line numbers. Rejected higher level: behavior text is local parse failure handling only, not system process behavior or AI output.
behaviors.test_description: Write malformed YAML with known bad line in temp config file, run loader, assert error message includes that line number and indicates parse failure.

behaviors.description: If config directory is missing at startup, loader creates it and writes defaults file before continuing.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure depends on loader + filesystem write path + defaults serialization sequence. REAL-INFRA: local filesystem behavior is required to catch real create/write ordering issues, but no subprocess/network/external API. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. ADVERSARIAL-CRITIQUE: System could be argued for OS-specific permission edge cases; however behavior text only requires normal missing-directory bootstrap, which a temp real filesystem integration test covers. Rejected higher level: no requirement for subprocess execution or distributed infrastructure.
behaviors.test_description: Start with empty temp home/XDG root where config directory does not exist, invoke loader, assert directory created, defaults file exists with expected keys, and loader proceeds to usable config state.
